body: This PR adds ArgParse to the dependencies. A peel off from #1620.
title: Add ArgParse to deps

body:
This PR
 - moves more code into src.
 - Removes the `ordinary_diff_eq_bug_fixes` since no jobs use this feature anymore, and our diffeq compat environment was borked due to upstream incompatibilities for unmaintained compat ranges.
title: Move code into src

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Two SSP moist baroclinic wave jobs (central and first-order upwinding) failed after #1605. With a slightly smaller dt they run stably (see build [949](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-longruns/builds/949#0187d600-35e6-4351-881c-7fafaeae042a)), so I reduced the dt. cc @valeriabarra 

## To-do

-->

-->

title: Reduce dt in some SSP longrun jobs

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Remove hyperdiffusion of grid-scale vertical velocity as we are not sure if it is correct, especially when there is topography. Fow now we keep only the hyperdiffusion of subgrid-scale vertical velocity.

This partially reverts #1605 (reverts the change to grid-scale w but keeps the change to subgrid-scale w).

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- Remove hyperdiffusion of grid-scale vertical velocity @akshaysridhar 
- Update docs
- Change back the dt in some SSP longrun jobs @valeriabarra
